title: Deliciously Caramelized Vietnamese Noodles Bowl
description: A tangy and springy Vietnamese dish featuring caramelized dasima-kombu, perfect for kids and macrobiotic diets, served in a Korean brass bowl.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the dasima-kombu sheets and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the soy sauce, fish sauce, and lime juice, and stir to combine.
Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the caramelized onion and dasima-kombu mixture.
Top with bean sprouts and chopped cilantro.
Serve the noodles in a Korean brass bowl.
Garnish with additional cilantro and lime wedges, if desired.
